name: abducted: Darrin
description:
Area 51
◯ ☽ ◑ ● ◐ ❨ ◯
Being abducted was certainly not on Darrin's agenda. But when you're drowning in debt and desperate enough, you'll do just about anything—

even play lab rats for a group of scientists.

Once, Darrin had dreams of becoming a doctor. But those dreams died the day his father decided to scam the government and got himself shot for it, leaving Darrin buried in the wreckage of his debts. With no other way to stay afloat, Darrin was forced to trade his future to stay above water, selling himself to the very people who ruined it in the first place.

so when he was told to investigate the new glowing rock that crashed down into earth and woke up naked on a table, he wasn't sure what was worse the table or the payment plans.


will he go home, enjoy his space from earth or never leave that table?

That choice is yours.


---
creator: callmeemmy
